findings.title: Admin key public in JS bundle
findings.description: NEXT_PUBLIC_ADMIN_KEY baked into client bundle, sent as x-admin-key from browser
findings.exploit_scenario: Extract key from JS bundle, call any /api/admin/* endpoint directly
findings.impact: Full admin API takeover, all customer PII exposed
findings.recommendation: Remove NEXT_PUBLIC_ADMIN_KEY, use session cookie for admin auth

findings.title: Stored XSS via dangerouslySetInnerHTML on email body
findings.description: Received emails rendered as raw HTML — attacker can send malicious JS payload
findings.exploit_scenario: Customer sends support email with <script> tag, admin opens it, JS runs in authenticated session
findings.impact: Admin account takeover, customer data exfiltration

findings.title: imageId ownership not verified in /api/generate
findings.description: imageId updated without checking userId matches session
findings.exploit_scenario: Authenticated user passes another user's imageId, overwrites their portrait
findings.impact: Any logged-in user can corrupt any other user's image record

findings.title: Rate limit bypass via X-Forwarded-For spoofing
findings.exploit_scenario: Rotate spoofed IP header to bypass login/signup/checkout rate limits
findings.impact: Unlimited brute force on login, unlimited signups, checkout abuse

findings.title: In-memory rate limiter ineffective on serverless
findings.description: Map resets on cold start — Vercel serverless makes all rate limits bypassable
findings.exploit_scenario: Wait for instance timeout, rate limit resets, repeat

findings.title: Guest generation limit bypassable via incognito
findings.exploit_scenario: Open incognito per generation — unlimited free AI credits
